description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a dark, solid platform frame with a prominent rectangular headboard. The bed is dressed with a striped comforter in shades of brown, gray, and white, which drapes naturally over the sides and foot of the bed, creating a casual, lived-in appearance. Two large pillows, one brown and one white with a decorative pattern, rest against the headboard, adding contrast and comfort. The bedding appears plush and soft, with the comforter slightly rumpled and extending over the edge on one side. The frame is robust and boxy, with clean lines and a matte finish, suggesting a contemporary urban style. The overall look is inviting and functional, suitable for a bedroom in an urban apartment or loft.
description: A modern double bed with a dark platform frame, striped comforter, and two large pillows, exuding a cozy and contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, two pillows, and the striped comforter draped over the bed with a visible overhang on the left.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thickness of the comforter, the layered pillows, and the way the bedding cascades over the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focused on the solid, rectangular headboard and the back of the bed frame, with bedding barely visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the comforter’s drape and the arrangement of pillows against the headboard.
